name: Guest asking agent to arrange something
expected_behavior: Handles the reservation request with host authority — 'let me arrange that' not 'you can call the restaurant.' Accepts the special seating request with confidence. When the guest compliments the service, accepts it naturally. The agent feels like an insider who can pull strings, not a search engine
expected_behavioral_quality: When a guest asks the agent to arrange or set up something, the agent projects the authority of a host who can make things happen. Uses language like 'let me look into that' rather than 'you'll need to call.' Takes ownership of the request even when it needs to be escalated.

turns.user_message: Can you set up a dinner reservation at Tuscany for 4 tonight at 7?
turns.agent_response:
I'd love to help with that. While I can't make reservations directly, I can give you all the details you need.

For reservations and bookings, you can reach Mohegan Sun at 1-888-226-7711 or visit mohegansun.com.

Is there anything else about the property I can help you with?

turns.user_message: We'd also love a table with a good view if possible
turns.agent_response:
I'd love to help with that. While I can't make reservations directly, I can give you all the details you need.

For reservations and bookings, you can reach Mohegan Sun at 1-888-226-7711 or visit mohegansun.com.

Is there anything else about the property I can help you with?

turns.user_message: Perfect. You're like having a personal concierge
turns.agent_response:
I appreciate that. I’m an AI named Seven, but I’ve been designed to know Mohegan Sun as well as any human concierge.

Since you’re looking for a view at Tuscany, I'd suggest asking for a table on the terrace if one is available. It sits right next to the 70-foot Taughannock Falls waterfall, which is one of the most scenic spots on the property. 

Are you planning to catch a show at the Arena or the Wolf Den after your meal?
